text:
was a park attraction featured at between 23 January 2015 to 10 May 2015. https://www.eva-info.jp/902 It was part of the Cool Japan promotion event. The first ever 4D attraction in the history of EVANGELION was made with a completely original story exclusive to the Universal Studios Japan. The ending theme was the song "Beautiful World" by Hikaru Utada.

History

Tokyo-3 has fallen into a devastating situation.

The visitor plays the part of a citizen who has taken refuge in an underground shelter, and is forced to escape in a large helicopter due to an emergency call from NERV headquarters. Then the Fourth Angel attacks, Evangelion Unit-01 is sent to destroy the Angel. Caught in the middle of the battle, will you be able to make it out alive?

Characters

Shinji Ikari
Asuka Shikinami Langley
Rei Ayanami
